role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed the Lao script and phone number prefix.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Cocos nucifera, Lagerstroemia) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, utility poles, and curb painting.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure styles and Google Street View metadata.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the Lao script as the primary disambiguator. The tournament logic was sound, using the script to eliminate Vietnam and Brazil.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Script and phone number match image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Tropical vegetation and flat terrain match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Palm trees and flowering trees match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Utility poles and curb styles match image.
